ab: Asaw, uniyan lra za biciw i ruma’, uwa trima’ za biciw inu.
ch: W:Asaw，家裡沒有米酒了，你去買米酒。
en: Asaw, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

ab: ulra ziya a saya dalilr i sawka, amanan ta ziya tremima’.
ch: M:廚房裡還有一瓶，不用買吧。
en: There is still one bottle left in the kitchen, so there is no need to buy one!

ab: ’azi karuwa na saya dalilr, uwa ziya trima’ za zuwaya dalilr!
ch: W:一瓶不夠，再去買兩瓶回來！
en: One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

ab: tratrima’ ku za biciw maniwan mu?
ch: m:我要買米酒，你們有賣嗎?
en: I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?

ab: ulra, tratrima’ u za manueman?
en: Yes! How many bottles do you need?

ab: tratrima’ ku za zuwaya dalilr, zi tratrima’ ku ziya za saya luvuk za veras.
ch: m:我要買兩瓶，還要買一包米。
en: I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

ab: antri na veras a, tratrima’ u ziya za eman?
ch: w:米在這裡，你還需要什麼嗎?
en: Here is the rice, what else do you need?

ab: tratrima’ ku ziya za trinun, ulra mu trinun?
en: I want some eggs too, do you have some?

ab: piya mi lra meniwan kana trinun.
en: We are out of eggs.

ab: tratrima’ ku za kiping.
en: I want to buy some clothes.

ab: tratrima’ ku za kavang.
en: I want to buy some clothes.

ab: maranger u tremima’ kana kemuda?
en: What kind of clothes do you like?

ab: tratrima’ ku kana kiping na lriketri tu ’aselr.
en: I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.

ab: tratrima’ ku kana kavang na lriketri tu ’aselr.
en: I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.

ab: kemuda ini na zemiyar?
en: How about this red one?

ab: ulra ziya a zuma tu pinivalrayan?
en: Do you have another color?

ab: ulra ziya a vulretri’ zi a trangiya tu pinivalrayan.
en: We have white and blue ones too.

ab: verayay ku za saya za trangiya na kiping!
ch: m:請給我一件藍色的衣服！
en: Please give me the clothes in blue.

ab: verayay ku za saya za trangiya na kavang.
ch: m:請給我一件藍色的衣服。
en: Please give me the clothes in blue.

ab: Asaw mukuwa u i iyan a haremay? mukuwa u merenarenaza?
ch: W:Asaw你剛剛去哪裡了?你去運動嗎?
en: Asaw, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: ’azi, mukuwa ku puwalranga kani imu na vavayan tremima’ za kulang.
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: kemazu awlra, miwari u nu karauv? wawai u kurekasa kaninku keravi?
ch: W:這樣啊，你晚上有沒有空?要不要和我一起吃飯？
en: No wonder! Are you available at night? Would you like to have a meal with me?

ab: ’azi ku karuwa, auwa ku tremima’a za kiping.
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.

ab: ’azi ku karuwa, auwa ku tremima’a za kavang.
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.

ab: kurelranga ku lra kaninu nu kemazu.
en: Then, I will go with you.

ab: ’inavayan, kiumalra ku ziya pidaya paisu ini na savetu’ na kulang?
ch: m:你好，請問這把菜多少錢?
en: Hello, how much is this bunch of vegetables?

ab: savetu’ makavetra’an na kulang.
en: The vegetables are $20 for a bunch.

ab: pidaya paisu ini na vurasi?
en: How much are these sweet potatoes?

ab: satingting makatelun na vurasi.
en: Thirty dollars for a pound.

ab: verayay ku za zuwaya vetu’ za kulang zi za saya tingting za vurasi.
ch: m:請給我兩把菜和一斤地瓜。
en: Please give me two bunches of vegetables and a pound of sweet potatoes.
